name: Brownie Bottom Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Lightly grease and flour a 9-inch springform pan and set aside.
3. Prepare the cake batter: Melt butter and baking chocolate in a 3-quart heavy saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and let cool mixture to lukewarm.
4. Add sugar and eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in milk and vanilla. Stir in flour and salt until just combined.
5. Spoon batter into prepared springform pan and spread evenly. Bake for 25 minutes.
6. Prepare the topping: Beat cream cheese and vanilla with an electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in sour cream; pour over brownie bottom (filling should almost come to the top of the pan).
7. Return pan to oven and bake for 55 to 60 minutes or until center is nearly set.
8. Run a knife around the rim of the pan to loosen cake, then cool before removing the rim of the pan. Refrigerate for 4 hours or overnight.
9. Let cake stand at room temperature for 30 minutes before serving. Makes 12 servings.
